# Allow all crawlers, but point to the sitemap
# Place this in /public/robots.txt
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow old pages that should not be indexed
Disallow: /mystory/
Disallow: /cdn-cgi/

# Point to sitemap (will be generated by @astrojs/sitemap)
Sitemap: https://alvaroar.es/sitemap-index.xml
